review_reason: Phase 3 blocked: ParametricTruthLemma requires LinearOrder D, but CanonicalMCS is only Preorder. The plan v8 approach cannot be completed without either: (1) adapting truth lemma for Preorder, (2) finding alternative proof path, or (3) accepting Int-based completeness as sufficient.

artifacts.summary: Phase 1 completed with verification findings. Phases 2-5 blocked by LinearOrder requirement.

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 (Verify CanonicalMCS Infrastructure) completed successfully. Key findings: (1) canonicalMCS_forward_F/backward_P are proven sorry-free, (2) ParametricTruthLemma requires LinearOrder D which CanonicalMCS does not satisfy, (3) Int-based truth lemma exists but Int is not dense. Plan v8 phases 2-5 cannot proceed without addressing the LinearOrder requirement.

errors.message: Plan v8 phases 2-5 blocked: CanonicalMCS is only Preorder, but truth lemma requires LinearOrder D. The CanonicalMCS all-MCS approach has proven forward_F/backward_P, but cannot be used with existing truth lemma infrastructure.
errors.recommendation: Consider: (1) Create Preorder-specific truth lemma for CanonicalMCS, (2) Use Int completeness and document dense completeness as future work, (3) Find alternative proof path that doesn't require LinearOrder

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 1 verified CanonicalMCS has sorry-free forward_F/backward_P, but truth lemma requires LinearOrder which CanonicalMCS lacks. Plan blocked.
